description: Support multiple receipt images per expense (max 5), with thumbnails in edit modal, full-size viewer, upload, and delete

userStories.title: Create ReceiptImage model and data migration
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a model to store multiple receipt images per expense.
acceptanceCriteria: Create ReceiptImage model with fields: id, expense (FK to Expense, related_name='receipts'), image (ImageField upload_to='receipts/'), created_at (auto_now_add)
Generate and run migration successfully
Add data migration: for each Expense with a non-empty receipt_image, create a ReceiptImage record copying the image path
Tests pass: cd backend && python manage.py test core

userStories.title: Add receipt upload endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an API endpoint to upload receipt images to an expense.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/expenses/{id}/receipts/ accepts multipart form data with 'image' field
Validates image file size max 5MB, returns 400 if too large
Returns 400 if expense already has 5 receipt images
Only expense creator can upload (403 for others)
Returns 201 with {id, image} on success
Add URL pattern to core/urls.py
Tests pass: cd backend && python manage.py test core

userStories.title: Add receipt delete endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an API endpoint to delete a receipt image from an expense.
acceptanceCriteria: DELETE /api/expenses/{id}/receipts/{receipt_id}/ deletes the ReceiptImage record
Only expense creator can delete (403 for others)
Returns 404 if receipt does not belong to the expense
Returns 204 on success
Add URL pattern to core/urls.py
Tests pass: cd backend && python manage.py test core

userStories.title: Include receipts in ExpenseSerializer
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the expense API to return all receipt images.
acceptanceCriteria: ExpenseSerializer includes a read-only 'receipts' field: list of {id, image} objects
GET /api/groups/{id}/expenses/ returns receipts array for each expense
The old receipt_image field remains for backwards compatibility but is no longer used for new uploads
Tests pass: cd backend && python manage.py test core

userStories.title: Display receipt thumbnails in edit expense modal
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see all attached receipts when editing an expense.
acceptanceCriteria: Edit expense modal shows a Receipts section below form fields
Each receipt renders as a thumbnail (max 80px height, aspect ratio preserved)
If no receipts, show 'No receipts attached' text
Thumbnails loaded from expense.receipts array
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Full-size receipt viewer overlay
userStories.description: As a user, I want to click a receipt thumbnail to see the full-size image.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a thumbnail opens a full-screen overlay showing the full-size image
Overlay has dark background and close button (X)
Clicking overlay background closes it
Reuse existing receipt-overlay CSS pattern from GroupDetailView
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Delete receipt from edit modal
userStories.description: As the expense creator, I want to delete individual receipts from the edit modal.
acceptanceCriteria: Each receipt thumbnail has a small X/delete button in the corner
Clicking it shows a confirmation prompt before deleting
Confirming calls DELETE /api/expenses/{id}/receipts/{receipt_id}/
Thumbnail removed from list after successful deletion
Delete button only shown if current user is the expense creator
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Upload additional receipts from edit modal
userStories.description: As the expense creator, I want to add more receipts to an existing expense.
acceptanceCriteria: Edit modal shows an Add receipt file input below existing thumbnails
Selecting a file uploads it via POST /api/expenses/{id}/receipts/
New thumbnail appears in the list after successful upload
File input hidden when 5 receipts already attached
Only shown if current user is the expense creator
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Upload receipt during expense creation
userStories.description: As a user, I want to attach a receipt image when creating a new expense.
acceptanceCriteria: Add expense form keeps existing file input for receipt
After expense is created via POST /api/groups/{id}/expenses/, selected file uploaded via POST /api/expenses/{id}/receipts/
Remove old receipt_image field usage from create flow
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Update expense list receipt indicator
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see which expenses have receipts in the expense list.
acceptanceCriteria: Expense rows in group detail show receipt count if 1+ receipts (e.g. paperclip icon + count)
No indicator for expenses with 0 receipts
Uses the receipts array length from the API response
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
